warnings.detail: Staggered fade-in transition on .eavi-hints li should be gated behind a prefers-reduced-motion check as noted, but ensure the CSS uses prefers-reduced-motion: no-preference to opt in rather than prefers-reduced-motion: reduce to disable, matching the existing pattern at style.css lines 99-105.

The 500-char budget test (line 229) currently joins all childNodes except closeBtn. Scoping to

elements only is the right call since the hint

    is structured data not prose, but verify the total panel text including hints stays reasonable — consider adding a separate upper bound (e.g., 800 chars total) so hints don't bloat unchecked.

decision: Plan is well-structured, acceptance criteria are fully mapped, risks are identified with mitigations, and all referenced code artifacts match the current codebase. Approved to implement.
